summary: Next.js 16 frontend for Signal Studio — a comprehensive signal builder/library platform with AI chat, visual editor, Oracle integration, admin console, and Salesforce embed capability. 25 pages, 30+ components, JWT auth, rate limiting, PostgreSQL backend. Active development with security hardening and demo polish in recent commits.

tech_stack.ui: React 18, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, React Flow

score_rationale.revenue_potential: Direct enterprise product for ForwardLane/SignalHaus — signal generation platform with Salesforce embed and Oracle ML integration targets high-value finserv clients like Invesco
score_rationale.strategic_value: Core product offering; combines AI, data analytics, and client-facing UI — central to business positioning
score_rationale.completeness: 25 pages built, auth/middleware done, but many features feel demo-stage (visual builder, canvas, oracle-ml). Easy-button/embed exists but needs polish
score_rationale.urgency: Recent commits show active demo prep (easy-button public access for screenshots, admin preview for demo fallback) — Invesco demo likely imminent
score_rationale.effort_remaining: Auth, rate limiting, core pages exist. Remaining: mobile responsive, Salesforce embed production-ready, performance optimization, error handling consistency
score_rationale.ci_pipeline: Basic CI exists (lint + build + test) but no deploy pipeline, no preview environments, no E2E in CI
score_rationale.test_quality: 24 test files exist but mostly unit/smoke level. E2e specs exist but only 2 found. No visible coverage thresholds enforced

items: Polish easy-button page — ensure all demo flows work end-to-end without auth friction
Harden admin preview page as reliable demo fallback
Fix any broken demo routes (ai-prompt, animated-input demos)
Ensure signal-library and signal-builder pages render cleanly with sample data
Add loading states and error boundaries on all demo-visible pages
Production-harden easy-button/embed route with proper auth token passthrough
Add iframe resize/postMessage communication for Salesforce Lightning container
Test embed in actual Salesforce sandbox environment
Add embed configuration options (theme, branding, feature flags)
Document embed integration steps for client IT teams
Add token refresh flow on frontend (currently have /api/auth/refresh but unclear client usage)
Add role-based access control for admin vs client views
Audit all public bypass routes for security gaps
Add session timeout handling with graceful re-auth
Audit all 25 pages for mobile breakpoints
Make sidebar navigation collapsible/hamburger on mobile
Ensure signal cards and chat interface work on tablet for Salesforce mobile
Test visual-builder on touch devices (React Flow touch support)
Add dynamic imports for heavy components (React Flow, chart libraries)
Implement route-level code splitting for 25 page routes
Add API response caching for signal library and templates
Profile and optimize initial bundle size
Add Web Vitals monitoring (LCP, CLS, FID)
Add E2E tests for critical demo flows (signal creation, library browse, embed)
Add Playwright E2E to CI pipeline
Add preview deployment on PRs (Railway or Vercel preview)
Set coverage threshold (aim for 60%+ on lib/)
Add visual regression tests for demo pages

key_risks: Demo-stage features exposed publicly could embarrass in client demos if edge cases hit
No preview environments means manual QA before every demo
Oracle ML and vectorization agents are complex — failure modes not well-tested
24 test files for 25 pages + 30 components + multiple API routes = low coverage
